recommendations.title: The Reef
recommendations.overview: A great white shark hunts the crew of a capsized sailboat along the Great Barrier Reef.

recommendations.title: Black Water
recommendations.overview: Based on true events, Grace, her boyfriend Adam, and her younger sister, Lee, are on holiday in Northern Australia when they decide to take a tour down a river. As they drift into a swamp, their boat suddenly capsizes. Stranded in the flooded swamp,

recommendations.title: Black Water: Abyss
recommendations.overview: An adventure-loving couple convince their friends to explore a remote, uncharted cave system in the forests of Northern Australia. With a tropical storm approaching, they abseil into the mouth of the cave, but when the caves start to flood, tensions

recommendations.title: Jaws
recommendations.overview: When the seaside community of Amity finds itself under attack by a dangerous great white shark, the town's chief of police, a young marine biologist, and a grizzled shark hunter embark on a desperate quest to kill the beast before it strikes again.

recommendations.title: A Streetcar Named Desire
recommendations.overview: A disturbed, aging Southern belle moves in with her sister for solace — but being face-to-face with her brutish brother-in-law accelerates her downward spiral.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: An American family on holiday in Africa becomes lost in a game reserve and stalked by vicious killer lions.

recommendations.title: Violation
recommendations.overview: A troubled woman on the edge of divorce returns home to her younger sister after years apart. But when her sister and brother-in-law betray her trust, she embarks on a vicious crusade of revenge.

recommendations.title: No Mercy
recommendations.overview: A woman seeks to take revenge when her younger sister disappears and she finds out that her sister suffered violence and sexual abuse from school bullies.

recommendations.title: Zombie Ass: Toilet of the Dead
recommendations.overview: Wracked with guilt over her younger sister's suicide, pretty young karate student Megumi accompanies a group of older friends on a camping trip into the woods, where they're attacked by feces covered undead.
